props.ChoiceText: The house above you faltered, and survival depended on whether you could continue order without being seen to replace the master.
props.ChoiceBio: A failing master taught you that authority can exist without title long before anyone admits it.

0.TransitionText: Because a failing master taught you that authority can exist without title long before anyone admits it, household authority remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Steward, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: Someone in the house still knows who truly kept it standing.
